objective: Define the ML-KEM library boundary before implementing key generation, encapsulation, and decapsulation.

tests.name: rust_derivation_crate_gate
tests.expected_signal: The Rust crate remains internal and derivation-test-first after the field, polynomial, encoding, vector, and constant-time gates are documented

tests.name: api_surface_fails_closed_until_implemented
tests.expected_signal: KEM operations throw NotImplemented rather than toy cryptography

agent_notes: The Rust track now has an internal derivation crate with no public ML-KEM API yet.
The C++ green state proves API shape and fail-closed behavior only.
